# PERF-164 positive: db.Query without Context in a handler
lang: go
file: PERF-164-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	rows, _ := db.Query("SELECT id FROM users")
	defer rows.Close()
	_ = rows
}
